note: Intended design (plan ①): the redesigned board render flow (1b + 1c). New pure helpers — phaseProgress (one 5-slot done/current/pending vector powering both the FR-4 dots and the FR-9 bars), pillLabel/pillStyleFor (badge() stays canonical), and gates() (the needs-you strip + number-key answering) — feed the new elements over the SAME contract.Repo. The as-is baseline is charts/before/flow.mmd.

diagrams.title: Redesigned board render flow (1b pills/dots/stripe/collapsed-changelog/footer + 1c needs-you strip/bars/number-keys)
